HGSS.396.0000:
Hold it there, kiddo!\f
The toll is $1,000 to go through.\f
HGSS.396.0002:
Then pay what you have, please.\f
Those who have no money, hmm...
can go through free of charge!\f
HGSS.396.0003:
He-he-he. We’re making a bundle.\f
Everyone wants to see what’s going
on up at Lake of Rage.
HGSS.396.0004:
I got chased from my post by
these Team Rocket thugs.\f
Then they just disappeared.
Someone apparently destroyed\r
their hideout.\f
...One more thing!\r
I found this under the counter.\r
It makes me uncomfortable.\r
Could I give it to you?\f
HGSS.396.0006:
It contains Sludge Bomb!\f
It not only damages the target
but also poisons it sometimes.\r
See!\f
Doesn’t it make you feel
uncomfortable?
